caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture on systems thinking and its applications, as indicated by the visual diagram displayed on the screen. The diagram is a complex network of interconnected nodes, each representing different concepts such as "awaken," "systems thinking," "models and methods," "developing models," "model sharing," "what people do," "buying & selling," "moments," "we have a problem," "fight club," "leadership," "how people think," and "future of society." These nodes are linked with arrows, suggesting relationships and processes between them. The presenter, visible in a small window on the right side of the screen, seems to be explaining the connections and flow within this system. The background shows multiple browser tabs open, indicating that the presentation might involve various resources or references. The overall focus of the video is likely on understanding and applying systems thinking to address complex problems and societal issues.
